name: Plush Baby Blanket - Space - Cloud Island™
description:
This Print Plush Blanket from Cloud Island™ is a must-have for keeping your little one cozy during stroller rides and snuggle or cuddle time. This baby blanket is adorned with a vibrant space print on a dark backdrop, featuring blanket-stitched edging for added flair. Made of 100% recycled polyester with a soft, fuzzy surface, the plush blanket is perfect for tummy time, car rides, or swaddling and is conveniently machine washable for easy care.

Cloud Island™: Designed with love. Made without compromise.
